heading: Omitted
label: 72, 73 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections were omitted in the general reorganization of this chapter by , , .Pub. L. 90–487, § 182 Stat. 761Aug. 15, 1968Section 72, , pt. B, § 1 (part), , defined the words “person” and “in interstate or foreign commerce”. See .act Aug. 11, 1916, ch. 31339 Stat. 482section 75 of this titleSection 73, , pt. B, § 1 (part), , made associations, partnerships, and corporations liable for the acts of their agents within the scope of their employment or office. See .act Aug. 11, 1916, ch. 31339 Stat. 482section 87d of this title
